title: Industrial Production Managers
description: Plan, direct, or coordinate the work activities and resources necessary for manufacturing products in accordance with cost, quality, and quantity specifications.

tasks.text: Set and monitor product standards, examining samples of raw products or directing testing during processing, to ensure finished products are of prescribed quality.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct or coordinate production, processing, distribution, or marketing activities of industrial organizations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review processing schedules or production orders to make decisions concerning inventory requirements, staffing requirements, work procedures, or duty assignments, considering budgetary limitations and time constraints.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Review operations and confer with technical or administrative staff to resolve production or processing problems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Hire, train, evaluate, or discharge staff or resolve personnel grievances.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop or implement production tracking or quality control systems, analyzing production, quality control, maintenance, or other operational reports to detect production problems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare and maintain production reports or personnel records.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Review plans and confer with research or support staff to develop new products or processes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop budgets or approve expenditures for supplies, materials, or human resources, ensuring that materials, labor, or equipment are used efficiently to meet production targets.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain current knowledge of the quality control field, relying on current literature pertaining to materials use, technological advances, or statistical studies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Coordinate or recommend procedures for facility or equipment maintenance or modification, including the replacement of machines.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Initiate or coordinate inventory or cost control programs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Negotiate materials prices with suppliers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct site audits to ensure adherence to safety and environmental regulations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Develop or enforce procedures for normal operation of manufacturing systems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Implement operational and emergency procedures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain records to demonstrate compliance with safety and environmental laws, regulations, or policies.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Monitor permit requirements for updates.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Optimize operational costs and productivity consistent with safety and environmental rules and regulations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare reports on operations and system productivity or efficiency.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Supervise subordinate employees.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
